Priya Nair

Senior Product Manager · 0-to-1 Fintech · Ex-Stripe · I ship things people actually use
London, England, United Kingdom

About

I turn fuzzy problems into shipped product. Twelve years across payments, lending, and developer tools — three of them at Stripe building the dashboard 200k businesses log into every day. I'm at my best in the messy 0-to-1 phase: talking to users, killing my own ideas, and finding the one feature that moves the metric. I don't believe in roadmaps that survive contact with reality unchanged. Outside work I run, I read too much sci-fi, and I mentor first-time PMs.

Experience

Senior Product Manager
Monzo Bank · Full-time
Apr 2022 – Present · 2 yrs 2 mos
  • Owned the lending product line; grew approved-loan volume 3.4x in 18 months to £210M annualized
  • Ran 40+ user interviews that killed a planned feature and redirected a full quarter of eng time
  • Partnered with risk and compliance to ship instant decisioning under 900ms p95
Product Manager
Stripe · Full-time
Jun 2018 – Mar 2022 · 3 yrs 10 mos
  • Led the Dashboard Home redesign used daily by 200k+ businesses; raised activation 11%
  • Shipped self-serve onboarding that cut time-to-first-charge from 3 days to 20 minutes
